title: We respect your privacy
description: This playground stores your theme and language preferences in your browser only when you allow it. The source code and GitHub URLs you submit are processed in memory to execute your Worker. Learn more in our <1>Privacy Policy</1>.

necessary.label: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Required for the playground to function. Includes the consent record itself.

functional.label: Functional
functional.description: Remembers your theme (light/dark) and language preferences across visits.

preferences.label: Preferences
preferences.description: Reserved for future user-interface preferences. Currently unused.
